summary: Single failed EHR login attempt for user clinicshared from 10.10.20.102 to /login (bad_password). Likely user error on shared workstation, but could be early credential probing.
recommended_next_steps: Check for additional 100202 failures for the same user/source in the last 5–15 minutes.
Check whether 100205 (brute force correlation) triggered for this user/time window.
Check for any login_success events for clinicshared around the same time (success-after-failures).
Confirm the source host (10.10.20.102) is the expected shared workstation and the attempt aligns with normal clinic activity.
analyst_notes: No evidence of compromise from a single event; monitor for repetition and escalate if pattern continues.
